customtooltips.tooltip_list_screen.title: Manage Tooltips
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.title: Edit Tooltip
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.targe:
Accepts tags (e.g. #c:swords) 
or item ids (e.g. minecraft:diamond_sword).
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.posit:
Top (Under the item's name)
Bottom (Bottom of the tooltip)
Replace Name (Replaces the item's name)
Replace All (Replaces the entire tooltip)
Append (End of a line)
Prepend (Start of a line)
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.line_:
Offsets the line position in the tooltip.
Accepts positive integers if position is set to Top, Replace Name, Append, Prepend 
or negative integers if position is set to Bottom.
If the displayed text should be bold.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.itali: If the displayed text should be italic.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.under: If the displayed text should be underlined.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.strik: If the displayed text should be strikethrough.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.obfus: If the displayed text should be obfuscated.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.requi: If the tooltip requires pressing the Shift key to display.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.empty: Adds an empty line before the tooltip.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.anima: Animation offset that desynchronizes different animations.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.tickr: Speed of the animation. Closer to 0 is higher speed.
customtooltips.tooltip_list_widget.delet:
Are you sure you want to delete
the tooltip for %s?
customtooltips.toast.keybind_missing.des: You can set a Keybind to open this menu easily!
